selected_article.original_title: OpenAI now lets teams make custom bots that can do work on their own
selected_article.reason: Still the most actionable choice - teams can implement this immediately with concrete business value. The practical workflow automation examples make it highly shareable among developers and business users.

post_main: OpenAI가 ChatGPT에 '워크스페이스 에이전트' 기능을 추가했다. 비즈니스/기업 요금제 사용자들이 클라우드에서 24시간 작동하는 맞춤형 AI 봇을 만들 수 있다. 웹에서 제품 피드백을 찾아 슬랙으로 보고서 자동 전송하거나, Gmail에서 영업 후속 이메일을 작성하는 식으로 말이다.
replies: 앤트로픽의 클로드 코워크 같은 에이전트 경쟁이 치열해지면서 사용자는 더 다양한 선택권을 갖게 됐다는 게 포인트다.
한 번 만든 에이전트를 팀 내에서 공유할 수 있어서 효율성이 높다. 예를 들어 마케팅팀이 만든 피드백 수집 봇을 영업팀도 쓸 수 있는 식.
다만 클라우드에서 회사 데이터를 처리하는 만큼 보안 정책 검토가 필요하고, 기업 요금제라 비용도 고려해야 한다.
개발팀이라면 코드 리뷰 요약, GitHub 이슈 트래킹, 배포 알림 자동화 같은 반복 업무부터 시작해보는 게 좋을 듯하다.

media_plan.reason: 워크스페이스 에이전트가 실제로 슬랙이나 Gmail과 연동되어 작업하는 모습을 보여주는 데모 영상이 기능 이해에 도움될 것

candidate_articles.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
candidate_articles.summary: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.
candidate_articles.details: The first StrictlyVC of 2026 hits SF on April 30. Tickets are going fast. Register now. Save up to $680 on your Disrupt 2026 pass. Ends 11:59 p.m. PT tonight. REGISTER NOW . Google Cloud on Wednesday announced that its eighth generation of custom-built AI chips, or tensor processing units (TPUs), will be split in two. One chip, named the TPU 8t, will be geared for model training and another, the TPU 8i, is aimed at inference. Inference is the ongoing usage of models, aka what happens after users submit prompts. As you might expect, the company touts some impressive performance specs for these new TPUs compared to the previous generations: up to 3x faster AI model training, 80% better performance per dollar, and the ability to get 1 million+ TPUs to work together in a single cluster. The upshot should be a lot more compute for a lot less energy — and cost to customers — than previous versions. It calls these chips TPUs, not GPUs, because its custom low-power chips were originally named Tensor. But Google’s chips are not a full frontal assault on Nvidia’s future, at least not yet. Like the other giant cloud providers, including Microsoft and Amazon , Google is using these chips to supplement the Nvidia-based systems it offers in its infrastructure. It is not flat-out replacing Nvidia. In fact, Google promises its cloud will have Nvidia’s latest chip, Vera Rubin, available later this year. One day the hyperscalers building their own AI chips (which includes Amazon, Microsoft, and Google) may grow to need Nvidia less, as enterprises move their AI needs to their clouds and port

OpenAI is giving users of its Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans access to cloud-based “workspace” agents available in ChatGPT that can perform business tasks. In its blog post , OpenAI gives examples of agents like one that finds product feedback on the web and sends a report in Slack and a sales agent that can draft follow-up emails in Gmail. These new agents follow increasing interest in agents across the AI landscape, especially after OpenClaw — the AI agent formerly known as Clawdbot and Moltbot that touts itself as the “AI that actually does things” — went viral . OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger now works for OpenAI . OpenAI is also facing increased competition from Anthropic, which offers its own Claude Cowork agent that can complete tasks for you using files from your computer, as well as a separate platform for making autonomous agents . OpenAI’s new workspace agents can be shared within organizations, “so teams can

Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. “I know a bubble when I see one.” That’s what Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), who led the push to create a new consumer financial regulator in the wake of the 2008 recession, told a crowd at a Vanderbilt Policy Accelerator event in Washington, DC on Wednesday. Warren warned of what she called “striking” parallels to that crisis in the AI industry. While she believes the technology has “enormous potential,” she warned that AI companies’ massive spending and borrowing practices are creating a tinderbox and Congress should step in. Though the AI industry has grown rapidly, Warren said the pace isn’t keeping up with their spending, requiring them to borrow from opaque sources like private credit funds, without the same kind of regulatory oversight that traditional banks face. “If AI companies are unable to increase revenues with lightning speed, they won’t be able to service their massive debt loads,” Warren said. “And because of shady accounting strategies, the first big stumble will have everyone running for the exits,

Ace is an AI-powered articulated robot that uses 12 cameras to compete against top table tennis players. Ace is an AI-powered articulated robot that uses 12 cameras to compete against top table tennis players. Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Posts from this author will be added to your daily email digest and your homepage feed. Humans have been building ping-pong playing robots for decades, such as Omron’s FORPHEUS that challenged amateur competitors at CES 2017. What sets Ace apart from the rest is that the robot, which was developed by Sony’s AI division , is the first that can hold its own against top-ranked human players and occasionally even beat them in matches that follow the official rules of the International Table Tennis Federation (ITTF). AI is already capable of besting humans at games like Chess and Go , but physical games pose a much greater challenge as robots have to be engineered to match the speed and responsiveness of the human mind and body. To be competitive at table tennis, a particularly difficult game with a ball moving at a high speed and spin that can alter its trajectory, Sony’s researchers developed a robotic system with eight joints. bottom.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
bottom.post_main: OpenAI가 기업용 에이전트 SDK에 '샌드박스' 기능을 추가했다. 이제 AI 에이전트가 격리된 컴퓨터 환경에서만 작동하고, 특정 파일과 코드에만 접근한다. 전체 시스템은 보호받
bottom.reply_preview: 샌드박스에서 에이전트는 지정된 워크스페이스 내 파일 읽기/쓰기, 승인된 도구 사용만 가능하다. 시스템 파일이나 다른 프로젝트는 접근 불가.

bottom.title: 구글, 크롬에 사용자 반복 프롬프트 저장하는 'AI 스킬' 추가
bottom.post_main:
구글 크롬에 'AI 스킬' 기능이 추가됐다. 자주 쓰는 AI 프롬프트를 저장해서 여러 웹페이지에서 재사용할 수 있다.

기존 제미나이는 웹페이지를 요약하거나 질문하는 정도였다면,
bottom.reply_preview: 사용법은 간단하다. 크롬에서 제미나이를 열고 프롬프트를 입력한 다음, '스킬로 저장' 버튼을 누르면 끝.
